---
title: "VRC01 Neutralization Report"
author: "Hyelim Shin "
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r, set-chunk-opts, include = FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE
)
```

```{r, load-data}
here::i_am("combined_report.Rmd")
  #! TO DO: add appropriate location


data <- readRDS(
  file = here::here ("data/data_clean.rds")) 

#! TO DO: add appropriate file path to data_clean.rds
```

```{r, child-reports}
#| child = c("subproject1/report.Rmd", "subproject2/report.Rmd")
```
